Dialog responsible for adding new transactions.

Adds the given transaction to model's list and to the table as a new row.

expensetracker.dialogs - package expensetracker.dialogs
Package of all the dialogs.
expensetracker.filters - package expensetracker.filters
Package of all the custom RowFilters.
expensetracker.forms - package expensetracker.forms
Package of all GUI forms.
expensetracker.main - package expensetracker.main
Package containg entry point.
expensetracker.table - package expensetracker.table
Package containing all classes needed for the main table.
expensetracker.transactions - package expensetracker.transactions
Package containing all classes required for transactions.
ExpenseView - Class in expensetracker.forms
Main part of the whole GUI.
